name: generic_visual_focus
description: Creates a family-level focus artifact by proposing salient object regions with center markers and labels, helping later reasoning compare two named objects for left/right or above/below relations.
applicability_conditions: Use when the task family asks for the 2D relative position of one visible object with respect to another visible object in a single image, especially generic left/right or above/below multiple-choice questions. Appropriate both on raw scene images and on intermediate artifacts where the objects are still visually identifiable. Best when a later reasoning step can use a small set of image-derived candidate object regions and their centers rather than fixed coordinates or object-specific rules.
